name_ja: アジアバイタルコンポーネンツ
layer_label_en: Thermal · liquid cooling for AI servers
layer_label_zh: 熱管理 · AI 伺服器液冷

price_target.kill_condition: If hyperscaler liquid-cooling adoption stalls (one major customer reverts to air for next-gen) → cut half. If two revert → exit.

A_ai_exposure.note: AI server thermal % of revenue rising fast — confirm latest disclosure

B_order_visibility.note: Hyperscaler design wins are the receipt — names matter

C_growth_potential.note: GPU power 700W → 1200W → 1800W roadmap = liquid cooling becomes mandatory

E_increasing_moat.note: CDU + cold-plate + manifold integration is system-level — sticky once designed in

F_revaluation.note: Priced as a fan/heatsink maker; transitioning to thermal-systems supplier

customers_named: [PENDING — confirm hyperscaler exposure: Microsoft, Meta, Google, AWS]
order_visibility.capacity_locked: [PENDING — capex on liquid-cooling lines, ramp schedule]

receipts.summary_en: [PENDING — capex announcement for liquid-cooling capacity with named customer]
receipts.summary_zh: [PENDING — 液冷產能擴建 · 客戶承諾]

receipts.summary_en: [PENDING — 法說會 quote on AI thermal % + Q+N visibility]
receipts.summary_zh: [PENDING — 法說會: AI 散熱比重 + 訂單能見度]

receipts.summary_en: [PENDING — copper, pump, manifold lead-time data + competitor capacity (Auras 3653, Sunon 2421)]
receipts.summary_zh: [PENDING — 銅材 / 泵浦 / 歧管交期 + 競品產能]

order_visibility.kill: Hyperscaler reverts to air cooling for next-gen (signaled at OCP summit) → cut half. Two revert → exit. Margin compression > 300 bps without volume offset → review.

mechanism.en: [PENDING ≥600 words: AI rack power density 30 kW → 120 kW+ → air cooling impossible → mandatory liquid → cold plate + CDU + manifold per rack → AVC dollar content per AI rack vs legacy server. Quantify content uplift.]

moat_widening.en: [PENDING: System-level integration, customer-specific thermal qualification cycles 12+ months, sticky once designed in. Capacity expansion + IP in CDU/manifold compounds the lead.]

revaluation_thesis.en: [PENDING: Priced as a notebook fan maker on legacy multiple. Liquid cooling = system-level supplier with structurally higher margin → multiple converges to thermal-systems peer (Vertiv VRT in US).]

kill_condition.en: Hyperscaler liquid-cooling adoption pace falls below GPU power roadmap. Or competitive entrants (Auras, Sunon, Cooler Master) compress pricing.

if_kill_then.en: Cut to half on first major hyperscaler reversion. Exit on second. Move to power (2308 Delta) which runs on rack-count not cooling-method.
